name: Sickle Cut
descriptionTemplate: When commanding armored units, its morale cannot diminish. When attacking, there is a X% chance the enemy cannot counterattack. After eliminating an enemy, gains the "Reaping" effect for 1 turn (effect increases damage dealt by 20% and ignores dodge). For every 30 attack of armored units under command, increases critical attack damage by 5%. If the unit’s attack reaches at least 180, its range is increased by 1.

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding armored units, its morale cannot diminish. When attacking, there is a 20% chance the enemy cannot counterattack. After eliminating an enemy, gains the "Reaping" effect for 1 turn (effect increases damage dealt by 20% and ignores dodge). For every 30 attack of armored units under command, increases critical attack damage by 5%. If the unit’s attack reaches at least 180, its range is increased by 1.
progression.renderedDescFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités blindées, sa moral ne peut pas diminuer. Lors d'une attaque, there is a 20% chance the ennemi cannot counterattack. Après avoir éliminé un ennemi, gagne l'effet « Reaping » pendant 1 tour (effect augmente les dégâts infligés de 20% and ignore esquive). Tous les 30 points d'attaque of unités blindées sous votre commandement, augmente attaques critiques les dégâts de 5%. If the unité’s attaque reaches at least 180, its portée is augmenté by 1.
